parameters.command:
DATE=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)
python3 /vulnforge/scanners/parser.py --target dvwa      --date $DATE --out /vulnforge/reports
python3 /vulnforge/scanners/parser.py --target juiceshop --date $DATE --out /vulnforge/reports
python3 /vulnforge/scanners/parser.py --target webgoat   --date $DATE --out /vulnforge/reports
